{{Quote|A lot of us have personal scores to settle with these Nagai after what they've done to our homeworld.|[[Fenn Shysa]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 100">[[Star Wars (1977) 100|''Star Wars'' (1977) 100]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Mandalore''' was fought in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] as part of the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] invasion.

[[Fenn Shysa]] led the defense of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], but his forces were insufficient to stop the Nagai. Shysa and his allies, including the half-[[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Bey]], retreated to the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] base on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], where, after qualifying to fly for the Alliance, they were able to exact some revenge during the [[Second Battle of Endor]].

{{Battle-stub}}
